MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Ike Owkuosa.
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendant Chris Smith is present.
Attorney Michelle Lee appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of AUG-19-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
